data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Minimum attendance to run class', but the evidence does not confirm that the system enforces this requirement. While the linked use case mentions that if fewer than 8 attendees show up, the class is rescheduled, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate how the system handles this condition. This constitutes a gap in the requirement validation as the necessary checks and balances to enforce minimum attendance are not evidenced.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality or checks to enforce minimum attendance requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the minimum attendance requirement.
